results.snippet: Section 1 — The Model Wars: April 2026's Unprecedented Release Window April 2026 has become the densest AI model release window in the industry's history. The benchmarks tell a story of rapid, simultaneous advancement across multiple capability ...

results.title: AI Agents News: April 2026 Roundup of Launches, Funding,... - OpusClip Blog
results.snippet: OpenAI shipped a model -native harness as an Agents SDK update (15 April ), Anthropic launched Managed Agents in public beta at $0.08 per session-hour (8 April ), Google rebranded Vertex AI to the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform at Cloud Next 2026 , and Microsoft shipped its Agent Governance Toolkit as an open-source seven-package release.

results.title: Google AI announcements from April 2026 - The Keyword
results.snippet: Here's a look back at some of our AI announcements from April . April 2026 was a huge month for AI at Google. Cloud Next '26 was all about helping businesses make the most of agentic AI with new releases like the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and our eighth-generation TPUs — two specialized chips designed for the agentic era.

results.title: AI Agents in 2026: From Prototypes to Autonomous Workflow Orchestrators
results.snippet: Conclusion: Orchestration as a Competitive Core CES 2026 showcased the hardware that will run the agents ; the real business advantage lies in the software that defines their intelligence. By moving AI agents from prototypes to autonomous workflow orchestrators, companies stop automating tasks and start automating operations.
